    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstUse!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstOp = if ip.block! ctx = some block ∧ ip.prev! ctx = none then some newOp else (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).lastOp = if ip.block! ctx = some block ∧ ip.next = none then some newOp else (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).prev = if some operation = ip.next then some newOp else if operation = newOp then ip.prev! ctx else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).next = if some operation = ip.prev! ctx then some newOp else if operation = newOp then ip.next else (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_insertOp? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {ip : InsertPoint} {h₁ : newOp.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).parent = if operation = newOp then ip.block! ctx else (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source

    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (operation.get! newCtx).opType = (operation.get! ctx).opType

    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → operation.getProperties! newCtx opCode = operation.getProperties! ctx opCode

    Rewriter.insertOp? ctx newOp ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → operation.getSuccessor! newCtx index = operation.getSuccessor! ctx index

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.firstUse!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.prev!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.next!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.parent!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :

    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.firstOp!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).firstOp = (block.get! ctx).firstOp

    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.BlockPtr.lastOp!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).lastOp = (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.Rewriter.unsetParentAndNeighbors.OperationPtr.prev!_unsetParentAndNeighbors {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hIn : op'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (unsetParentAndNeighbors ctx op' hIn)).prev = if operation = op' then none else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source

    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstUse!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).firstOp = if (op'.get! ctx).prev = none ∧ some block = (op'.get! ctx).parent then (op'.get! ctx).next else (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).lastOp = if (op'.get! ctx).next = none ∧ some block = (op'.get! ctx).parent then (op'.get! ctx).prev else (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.detachOp ctx op' h₁ h₂ h₃)).prev = if some operation = (op'.get! ctx).next then (op'.get! ctx).prev else if operation = op' then none else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_detachOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {h₁ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₂ : op'.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : (op'.get ctx h₂).parent.isSome = true} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstUse!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).prev = if some block = ip.next then some newBlock else if block = newBlock then ip.prev! ctx else (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).next = if some block = ip.prev! ctx then some newBlock else if block = newBlock then ip.next else (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).parent = if block = newBlock then ip.region! ctx else (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (block.get! newCtx).firstOp = (block.get! ctx).firstOp

    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.firstBlock!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (region.get! newCtx).firstBlock = if ip.region! ctx = some region ∧ ip.prev! ctx = none then some newBlock else (region.get! ctx).firstBlock
    source
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.lastBlock!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (region.get! newCtx).lastBlock = if ip.region! ctx = some region ∧ ip.next = none then some newBlock else (region.get! ctx).lastBlock
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.parent!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → (region.get! newCtx).parent = (region.get! ctx).parent
    source

    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getFirstUse!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
    Rewriter.insertBlock? ctx newBlock ip h₁ h₂ h₃ = some newCtx → value.getFirstUse! newCtx = value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_insertBlock? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newBlock : BlockPtr} {ip : BlockInsertPoint} {h₁ : newBlock.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ip.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {newCtx : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstUse!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).firstUse = (block.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).firstOp = if (op'.get! ctx).prev = none ∧ some block = (op'.get! ctx).parent then (op'.get! ctx).next else (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).lastOp = if (op'.get! ctx).next = none ∧ some block = (op'.get! ctx).parent then (op'.get! ctx).prev else (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).prev = if (op'.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ some operation = (op'.get! ctx).next then (op'.get! ctx).prev else if (op'.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ operation = op' then none else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).next = if (op'.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ some operation = (op'.get! ctx).prev then (op'.get! ctx).next else if (op'.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ operation = op' then none else (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_detachOpIfAttached {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op' : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op'.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.detachOpIfAttached ctx op' hCtx hOp)).parent = if operation = op' then none else (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source

    (opr.get! (Rewriter.replaceUse ctx use value' useIn newValueInBounds ctxIn)).value = if use = opr then value' else (opr.get! ctx).value

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_replaceUse {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {use : OpOperandPtr} {value' : ValuePtr} {useIn : use.InBounds ctx} {newValueInBounds : value'.InBounds ctx} {ctxIn : ctx.FieldsInBounds} :
    op.getOperands! (Rewriter.replaceUse ctx use value' useIn newValueInBounds ctxIn) = if use.op = op then (op.getOperands! ctx).set! use.index value' else op.getOperands! ctx

    op.getRegion! (Rewriter.replaceUse ctx use value' useIn newValueInBounds ctxIn) = op.getRegion! ctx

    Rewriter.replaceValue? ctx oldValue newValue oldIn newIn ctxIn depth = some newCtx → bop.get! newCtx = bop.get! ctx

    Rewriter.replaceValue? ctx oldValue newValue oldIn newIn ctxIn depth = some newCtx → op.getNumOperands! newCtx = op.getNumOperands! ctx

    Rewriter.replaceValue? ctx oldValue newValue oldIn newIn ctxIn depth = some newCtx → (opr.get! newCtx).owner = (opr.get! ctx).owner

    theorem OpOperandPtr.value!_replaceValue? and OperationPtr.getOperands!_replaceValue? requires Well-formedness preservation to be stated.

    source

    Rewriter.pushResult #

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = block.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop)).prev = (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop)).next = (operation.get! ctx).next

    @[simp]

    (operation.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop)).parent = (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.opType!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop)).opType = (operation.get! ctx).opType
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.attrs!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    (operation.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop)).attrs = (operation.get! ctx).attrs
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getProperties!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opCode : OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getProperties! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) opCode = operation.getProperties! ctx opCode
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumResults! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = if operation = op then operation.getNumResults! ctx + 1 else operation.getNumResults! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} :
    opResult.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = if opResult = op.nextResult ctx ⋯ then { type := type, firstUse := none, index := op.getNumResults! ctx, owner := op } else opResult.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumOperands! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = operation.getNumOperands! ctx
    source

    opOperand.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = opOperand.get! ctx

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getOperands! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = operation.getOperands! ctx

    operation.getNumSuccessors! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx

    blockOperand.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = blockOperand.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]

    operation.getSuccessor! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) index = operation.getSuccessor! ctx index

    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumRegions! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source

    operation.getRegion! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) idx = operation.getRegion! ctx idx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} :
    blockOperandPtr.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = blockOperandPtr.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]

    block.getNumArguments! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = block.getNumArguments! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
    blockArg.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = blockArg.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {region : RegionPtr} :
    region.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = region.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getFirstUse!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getFirstUse! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = if value = opResult (op.nextResult ctx ⋯) then none else value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getType! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = if value = opResult (op.nextResult ctx ⋯) then type else value.getType! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get!_pushResult {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {type : TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opOperandPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr} :
    opOperandPtr.get! (Rewriter.pushResult ctx op type hop) = if opOperandPtr = valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.opResult (op.nextResult ctx ⋯)) then none else opOperandPtr.get! ctx

    Rewriter.initOpResults #

    source
    @[simp]

    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumResults! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = if operation = op then op.getNumResults! ctx + (types.size - index) else operation.getNumResults! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    opResult.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = if h : opResult.op = op ∧ opResult.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opResult.index then { type := types[opResult.index], firstUse := none, index := opResult.index, owner := op } else opResult.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.type!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    (opResult.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx)).type = if h : opResult.op = op ∧ opResult.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opResult.index then types[opResult.index] else (opResult.get! ctx).type
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.firstUse!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    (opResult.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx)).firstUse = if opResult.op = op ∧ opResult.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opResult.index then none else (opResult.get! ctx).firstUse
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.index!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    (opResult.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx)).index = if opResult.op = op ∧ opResult.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opResult.index then opResult.index else (opResult.get! ctx).index
    source
    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.owner!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opResult : OpResultPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    (opResult.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx)).owner = if opResult.op = op ∧ opResult.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opResult.index then op else (opResult.get! ctx).owner
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumOperands! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = operation.getNumOperands! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {opOperand : OpOperandPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    opOperand.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = opOperand.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    operation.getOperands! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = operation.getOperands! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumSuccessors! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {blockOperand : BlockOperandPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    blockOperand.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = blockOperand.get! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessor!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {i : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getSuccessor! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) i = operation.getSuccessor! ctx i
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessors!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    operation.getNumRegions! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = operation.getNumRegions! ctx

    operation.getRegion! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) idx = operation.getRegion! ctx idx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtrPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {blockOperandPtr : BlockOperandPtrPtr} :
    blockOperandPtr.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = blockOperandPtr.get! ctx

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.getNumArguments!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {block : BlockPtr} :
    block.getNumArguments! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = block.getNumArguments! ctx

    theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr} {index : Nat} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} :
    blockArg.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = blockArg.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {region : RegionPtr} :
    region.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = region.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getFirstUse!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getFirstUse! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = match value with | opResult opRes => if opRes.op = op ∧ opRes.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opRes.index then none else value.getFirstUse! ctx | x => value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getType! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = match value with | opResult opRes => if x : opRes.op = op ∧ opRes.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opRes.index then types[opRes.index] else value.getType! ctx | x => value.getType! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get!_initOpResults {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {types : Array TypeAttr} {index : Nat} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hidx : index = op.getNumResults ctx ⋯} {opOperandPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr} :
    opOperandPtr.get! (Rewriter.initOpResults ctx op types index hop hidx) = match opOperandPtr with | valueFirstUse (ValuePtr.opResult opRes) => if x : opRes.op = op ∧ opRes.index < types.size ∧ op.getNumResults! ctx ≤ opRes.index then none else (opRes.get! ctx).firstUse | x => opOperandPtr.get! ctx

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessors!_pushRegion {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {region : RegionPtr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hregion : region.InBounds ctx} {hregionParent : (region.get! ctx).parent = none} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_pushRegion {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {region : RegionPtr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hregion : region.InBounds ctx} {hregionParent : (region.get! ctx).parent = none} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumRegions! (Rewriter.pushRegion ctx op region hop hregion hregionParent) = if operation = op then operation.getNumRegions! ctx + 1 else operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_pushRegion {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {region : RegionPtr} {hop : op.InBounds ctx} {hregion : region.InBounds ctx} {hregionParent : (region.get! ctx).parent = none} {index : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getRegion! (Rewriter.pushRegion ctx op region hop hregion hregionParent) index = if operation = op ∧ index = operation.getNumRegions! ctx then region else operation.getRegion! ctx index
    source

    (r.get! (Rewriter.pushRegion ctx op region hop hregion hregionParent)).firstBlock = (r.get! ctx).firstBlock

    (r.get! (Rewriter.pushRegion ctx op region hop hregion hregionParent)).parent = if r = region then some op else (r.get! ctx).parent

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.get!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {block : BlockPtr} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    block.get! ctx' = block.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (operation.get! ctx').prev = (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (operation.get! ctx').next = (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (operation.get! ctx').parent = (operation.get! ctx).parent

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.opType!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {operation : OperationPtr} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (operation.get! ctx').opType = (operation.get! ctx).opType

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    operation.getNumRegions! ctx' = if operation = op then op.getNumRegions! ctx + (regions.size - index) else operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {idx : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    operation.getRegion! ctx' idx = if x : operation = op ∧ idx ≥ op.getNumRegions! ctx ∧ idx < regions.size then regions[idx] else operation.getRegion! ctx idx

    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.parent!_initOpRegions_gen {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {index : Nat} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : index = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions index h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (region.get! ctx').parent = if ∃ (i : Nat), ∃ (x : i < regions.size), index ≤ i ∧ regions[i] = region then some op else (region.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.parent!_initOpRegions {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (region : RegionPtr), region ∈ regions → region.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {h₄ : 0 = op.getNumRegions ctx ⋯} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} (h : Rewriter.initOpRegions ctx op regions 0 h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ = some ctx') :
    (region.get! ctx').parent = if region ∈ regions then some op else (region.get! ctx).parent

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).firstOp = if (op.get! ctx).prev = none ∧ some block = (op.get! ctx).parent then (op.get! ctx).next else (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {block : BlockPtr} :
    (block.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).lastOp = if (op.get! ctx).next = none ∧ some block = (op.get! ctx).parent then (op.get! ctx).prev else (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp) → (operation.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).prev = if (op.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ some operation = (op.get! ctx).next then (op.get! ctx).prev else if (op.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ operation = op then none else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp) → (operation.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).next = if (op.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ some operation = (op.get! ctx).prev then (op.get! ctx).next else if (op.get! ctx).parent ≠ none ∧ operation = op then none else (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_eraseOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {hCtx : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {hOp : op.InBounds ctx} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.InBounds (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp) → (operation.get! (Rewriter.eraseOp ctx op hCtx hOp)).parent = if operation = op then none else (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.OpResultPtr.get!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {opResult : OpResultPtr} :
    opResult.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if valuePtr = ValuePtr.opResult opResult then have __src := opResult.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := some (opPtr.nextOperand! ctx), index := __src.index, owner := __src.owner } else opResult.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumOperands! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operation = opPtr then operation.getNumOperands! ctx + 1 else operation.getNumOperands! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtr.get!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operand : OpOperandPtr} :
    operand.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operand = opPtr.nextOperand ctx ⋯ then { nextUse := valuePtr.getFirstUse! ctx, back := OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse valuePtr, owner := opPtr, value := valuePtr } else have __src := operand.get! ctx; { nextUse := __src.nextUse, back := if valuePtr.getFirstUse! ctx = some operand then OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse (opPtr.nextOperand ctx ⋯) else (operand.get! ctx).back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }
    source
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtr.get!_pushOperand' {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {opPtrInBounds : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} (valuePtr : ValuePtr) (valuePtrInBounds : valuePtr.InBounds ctx) (operandPtr : OpOperandPtr) :
    operandPtr.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr opPtrInBounds valuePtrInBounds ctxInBounds) = if operandPtr = opPtr.nextOperand ctx ⋯ then { nextUse := valuePtr.getFirstUse! ctx, back := OpOperandPtrPtr.valueFirstUse valuePtr, owner := opPtr, value := valuePtr } else if valuePtr.getFirstUse! ctx = some operandPtr then have __src := operandPtr.get! ctx; { nextUse := __src.nextUse, back := OpOperandPtrPtr.operandNextUse (opPtr.nextOperand ctx ⋯), owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value } else operandPtr.get! ctx

    operation.getOperands! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operation = opPtr then (operation.getOperands! ctx).push valuePtr else operation.getOperands! ctx

    theorem Veir.BlockArgumentPtr.get!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {blockArg : BlockArgumentPtr} :
    blockArg.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if valuePtr = ValuePtr.blockArgument blockArg then have __src := blockArg.get! ctx; { type := __src.type, firstUse := some (opPtr.nextOperand! ctx), index := __src.index, loc := __src.loc, owner := __src.owner } else blockArg.get! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.firstBlock!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {region : RegionPtr} :
    (region.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃)).firstBlock = (region.get! ctx).firstBlock

    (region.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃)).lastBlock = (region.get! ctx).lastBlock

    (region.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃)).parent = (region.get! ctx).parent

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getType! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = value.getType! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getFirstUse!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {value : ValuePtr} :
    value.getFirstUse! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if value = valuePtr then some (opPtr.nextOperand! ctx) else value.getFirstUse! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OpOperandPtrPtr.get!_pushOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {valuePtr : ValuePtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : valuePtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operandPtr : OpOperandPtrPtr} :
    operandPtr.get! (Rewriter.pushOperand ctx opPtr valuePtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operandPtr = operandNextUse (opPtr.nextOperand ctx ⋯) then valuePtr.getFirstUse! ctx else if operandPtr = valueFirstUse valuePtr then some (opPtr.nextOperand! ctx) else operandPtr.get! ctx

    (block.get! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃)).firstUse = if block = blockPtr then some (opPtr.nextBlockOperand! ctx) else (block.get! ctx).firstUse

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_pushBlockOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getOperands! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = operation.getOperands! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_pushBlockOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumSuccessors! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operation = opPtr then operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx + 1 else operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_pushBlockOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operand : BlockOperandPtr} :
    operand.get! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operand = opPtr.nextBlockOperand ctx ⋯ then { nextUse := (blockPtr.get! ctx).firstUse, back := BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockFirstUse blockPtr, owner := opPtr, value := blockPtr } else have __src := operand.get! ctx; { nextUse := __src.nextUse, back := if (blockPtr.get! ctx).firstUse = some operand then BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockOperandNextUse (opPtr.nextBlockOperand ctx ⋯) else (operand.get! ctx).back, owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value }
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockOperandPtr.get!_pushBlockOperand' {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {opPtrInBounds : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {blockPtrInBounds : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {ctxInBounds : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operandPtr : BlockOperandPtr} :
    operandPtr.get! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr opPtrInBounds blockPtrInBounds ctxInBounds) = if operandPtr = opPtr.nextBlockOperand ctx ⋯ then { nextUse := (blockPtr.get! ctx).firstUse, back := BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockFirstUse blockPtr, owner := opPtr, value := blockPtr } else if (blockPtr.get! ctx).firstUse = some operandPtr then have __src := operandPtr.get! ctx; { nextUse := __src.nextUse, back := BlockOperandPtrPtr.blockOperandNextUse (opPtr.nextBlockOperand ctx ⋯), owner := __src.owner, value := __src.value } else operandPtr.get! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessor!_pushBlockOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {index : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getSuccessor! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃) index = if operation = opPtr ∧ index = operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx then blockPtr else operation.getSuccessor! ctx index
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessors!_pushBlockOperand {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {opPtr : OperationPtr} {blockPtr : BlockPtr} {h₁ : opPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : blockPtr.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getSuccessors! (Rewriter.pushBlockOperand ctx opPtr blockPtr h₁ h₂ h₃) = if operation = opPtr then (operation.getSuccessors! ctx).push blockPtr else operation.getSuccessors! ctx
    source

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands!_initOpOperands {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {n : Nat} {hn : 0 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ operands.size} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getNumOperands! (Rewriter.initOpOperands ctx op h₁ operands h₂ h₃ n hn) = if operation = op then operation.getNumOperands! ctx + n else operation.getNumOperands! ctx

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_initOpOperands {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {h₁ : op.InBounds ctx} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {n : Nat} {hn : 0 ≤ n ∧ n ≤ operands.size} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    operation.getOperands! (Rewriter.initOpOperands ctx op h₁ operands h₂ h₃ n hn) = if operation = op then operation.getOperands! ctx ++ operands.extract (operands.size - n) else operation.getOperands! ctx

    operation.getSuccessor! (Rewriter.initBlockOperands ctx op operands n h₁ h₂ h₃ hn) index = if operation = op ∧ index ≥ operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx then operands[index - operation.getNumSuccessors! ctx + operands.size - n]! else operation.getSuccessor! ctx index

    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.prev!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (block.get! ctx').prev = (block.get! ctx).prev
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.next!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (block.get! ctx').next = (block.get! ctx).next
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.parent!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (block.get! ctx').parent = (block.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.firstOp!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (block.get! ctx').firstOp = match insertionPoint, h₄ with | some ip, h₄ => if ip.block! ctx = some block ∧ ip.prev! ctx = none then some newOp else (block.get! ctx).firstOp | none, h₄ => (block.get! ctx).firstOp
    source
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.lastOp!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (block.get! ctx').lastOp = match insertionPoint, h₄ with | some ip, h₄ => if ip.block! ctx = some block ∧ ip.next = none then some newOp else (block.get! ctx).lastOp | none, h₄ => (block.get! ctx).lastOp
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.prev!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (operation.get! ctx').prev = match insertionPoint, h₄ with | some ip, h₄ => if operation = newOp then ip.prev! ctx else if some operation = ip.next then some newOp else (operation.get! ctx).prev | none, h₄ => if operation = newOp then none else (operation.get! ctx).prev
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.next!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (operation.get! ctx').next = match insertionPoint, h₄ with | some ip, h₄ => if operation = newOp then ip.next else if some operation = ip.prev! ctx then some newOp else (operation.get! ctx).next | none, h₄ => if operation = newOp then none else (operation.get! ctx).next
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.parent!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (operation.get! ctx').parent = if operation = newOp then match insertionPoint, h₄ with | some ip, h₄ => ip.block! ctx | none, h₄ => none else (operation.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.opType!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (operation.get! ctx').opType = if operation = newOp then opType else (operation.get! ctx).opType
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.attrs!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (operation.get! ctx').attrs = if operation = newOp then DictionaryAttr.empty else (operation.get! ctx).attrs
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getProperties!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getProperties! ctx' opType = if operation = newOp then properties else operation.getProperties! ctx opType
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumResults!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getNumResults! ctx' = if operation = newOp then resultTypes.size else operation.getNumResults! ctx

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getOperands!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumSuccessors!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :

    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessor!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {index : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getSuccessor! ctx' index = if operation = newOp then blockOperands[index]! else operation.getSuccessor! ctx index
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getSuccessors!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getSuccessors! ctx' = if operation = newOp then blockOperands else operation.getSuccessors! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumRegions!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getNumRegions! ctx' = if operation = newOp then regions.size else operation.getNumRegions! ctx
    source
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getRegion!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {idx : Nat} {operation : OperationPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → operation.getRegion! ctx' idx = if x : operation = newOp ∧ idx < regions.size then regions[idx] else operation.getRegion! ctx idx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.BlockPtr.getNumArguments!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {block : BlockPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → block.getNumArguments! ctx' = block.getNumArguments! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.firstBlock!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (region.get! ctx').firstBlock = (region.get! ctx).firstBlock
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.lastBlock!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (region.get! ctx').lastBlock = (region.get! ctx).lastBlock
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.RegionPtr.parent!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {region : RegionPtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → (region.get! ctx').parent = if region ∈ regions then some newOp else (region.get! ctx).parent
    source
    theorem Veir.ValuePtr.getType!_createOp {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {newOp : OperationPtr} {opType : OpInfo} {resultTypes : Array TypeAttr} {operands : Array ValuePtr} {blockOperands : Array BlockPtr} {regions : Array RegionPtr} {properties : HasOpInfo.propertiesOf opType} {insertionPoint : Option InsertPoint} {h₁ : ∀ (oper : ValuePtr), oper ∈ operands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₂ : ∀ (oper : BlockPtr), oper ∈ blockOperands → oper.InBounds ctx} {h₃ : ∀ (reg : RegionPtr), reg ∈ regions → reg.InBounds ctx} {h₄ : Option.maybe InsertPoint.InBounds insertionPoint ctx} {h₅ : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {value : ValuePtr} :
    Rewriter.createOp ctx opType resultTypes operands blockOperands regions properties insertionPoint h₁ h₂ h₃ h₄ h₅ = some (ctx', newOp) → value.getType! ctx' = match value with | opResult opRes => if x : opRes.op = newOp ∧ opRes.index < resultTypes.size then resultTypes[opRes.index] else value.getType! ctx | blockArgument ptr => value.getType! ctx
    source
    @[simp]
    theorem Veir.OperationPtr.getNumOperands_iff_replaceValue? {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {oldValue newValue : ValuePtr} {oldIn : oldValue.InBounds ctx} {newIn : newValue.InBounds ctx} {ctxIn : ctx.FieldsInBounds} {depth : Nat} {ctx' : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} {h_op : op.InBounds ctx'} (hctx' : Rewriter.replaceValue? ctx oldValue newValue oldIn newIn ctxIn depth = some ctx') :
    op.getNumOperands ctx' h_op = op.getNumOperands ctx ⋯
    source
    theorem Veir.IRContext.create_fieldsInBounds {OpInfo : Type} [HasOpInfo OpInfo] {ctx : IRContext OpInfo} {op : OperationPtr} (h : create OpInfo = some (ctx, op)) :
    ctx.FieldsInBounds ∧ op.InBounds ctx
